title: Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib
tagline: Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: Gurdwara Karamsar (Punjabi: ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਾ ਕਰਮਸਰ) is a prominent Sikh gurdwara complex in Rara Sahib, Ludhiana district, Punjab, India, attributed to Sant Isher Singh Ji and Sant Kishen
overview.description: Gurdwara Karamsar (Punjabi: ਗੁਰਦੁਆਰਾ ਕਰਮਸਰ) is a prominent Sikh gurdwara complex in Rara Sahib, Ludhiana district, Punjab, India, attributed to Sant Isher Singh Ji and Sant Kishen Singh Ji, two Brahmgiani Sikh saints of the 20th century. Gurdwara Karamsar was established in 1936 and was named after Sant Karam Singh Ji, a revered saint of Hoti Mardan and the predecessor of Sant Attar Singh Ji of Reru Sahib, who was the teacher of Sant Isher Singh Ji and Sant Kishen Singh Ji.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Rara Sahib
topPlaces.description: Rara Sahib is a village in the Ludhiana district of Punjab, India. Its spiritual significance was elevated following the visit of the sixth Sikh Guru, Guru Hargobind Sahib ji Ji, transforming it from the simple village of Rara to Rara Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Killa Hans
topPlaces.description: Killa Hans is a village located in Ludhiana district, Punjab, India. It is situated 150 km northeast of the sacred city of Amritsar and is 140 km west of Shri Anandpur Sahib, the birthplace of the Khalsa.

topPlaces.name: Dhoda, Ludhiana
topPlaces.description: Dhoda is a village located in the Ludhiana East tehsil, of Ludhiana district, Punjab.

topPlaces.name: Bhutta (Ludhiana East)
topPlaces.description: Bhutta is a village located in the Ludhiana East tehsil, of Ludhiana district, Punjab.

topPlaces.name: Siahar
topPlaces.description: Siahar is a village in Ludhiana district, Punjab, India, located in Payal tehsil. Punjabi is the local language, and the area straddles the border of Ludhiana and Sangrur districts.

topPlaces.name: Kuhli Kalan
topPlaces.description: Kuhli Kalan is a village in Punjab, India. Its zip code is 141119.

topPlaces.name: Shanker, Punjab
topPlaces.description: Shanker village is located in East Ludhiana tehsil in Ludhiana district in the Indian state of Punjab. The village is 13 km from district headquarter Ludhiana.

topPlaces.name: Ghudani Khurd
topPlaces.description: Ghudani Khurd is a small village near Khanna, Punjab, in India. It comes under Tehsil Payal Dist.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Karamsar Rara Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rara Sahib, Killa Hans, Dhoda, Ludhiana, Bhutta (Ludhiana East), Siahar.
